message:
fix(scheduler): update lock() calls to match parking_lot Mutex API

The project's Mutex type was migrated from std::sync::Mutex (which
returns a Result from lock()) to parking_lot::Mutex (which returns the
guard directly, panicking only on re-entrant deadlock). This commit
updates all remaining call sites that still used the now-unnecessary
.unwrap() after .lock().

Affected sites (all in test code):
- src/extensions.rs: 6 scheduler.lock().unwrap().schedule() calls in
  channel send/recv, ordering, and fairness tests
- tests/event_loop_conformance.rs: 12 scheduler.lock().unwrap().schedule()
  calls across determinism, timer, event-loop, hostcall, and interleaving
  conformance tests
- tests/lab_runtime_extensions.rs: 11 scheduler.lock().unwrap().schedule()
  calls across single-task, ordering, registration, budget, concurrent,
  and invariant test suites

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
